articles.title: News Point: Intense Heatwave & Hot Nights In Odisha; IMD Issues Urgent 5-Day Alert! - Kanak News Odisha
articles.full_text:
Odisha is turning into a literal furnace! With record-breaking temperatures and schools extending holidays, the next 5 days are going to be critical for the entire state!
The IMD has just issued a massive Yellow Warning for Odisha as a brutal heatwave grips both Western and Coastal regions. From Bhubaneswar and Cuttack to Sambalpur and Bolangir, the heat is becoming unbearable with a predicted 2 to 4-degree rise in temperature after April 23rd. Not just the scorching days, but "Warm Night" warnings have also been issued for districts like Sundargarh and Kalahandi. Educational institutions have officially extended their closures as the threat of sunstroke looms large.
